scripts.build:shared: npm run build --workspace @awb/lms-core && npm run build --workspace @awb/smartsheet-client
scripts.test:unit: npm run test --workspace @awb/lms-core && npm run test --workspace @awb/smartsheet-client
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:api
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace @awb/api && npm run build --workspace @awb/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @awb/lms-core && npm run lint --workspace @awb/smartsheet-client && npm run lint --workspace @awb/api && npm run lint --workspace @awb/web
